name: Property Timeline Report
query:
SELECT
    name,
    property,
    event_type,
    event_title,
    event_date,
    created_by
FROM `tabProperty Timeline`
WHERE docstatus < 2
{% if filters.property %}
  AND property = %(property)s
{% endif %}
{% if filters.event_type %}
  AND event_type = %(event_type)s
{% endif %}
ORDER BY event_date DESC
